flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Milwaukee Area Technical College are 8% below the public certificate-predominant peer median ($41.1k vs $44.6k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Milwaukee Area Technical College rose 22% between 2017 and 2020 ($12.2k → $15.0k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Milwaukee Area Technical College fell 20% between 2006 and 2009 (21.5% → 17.3%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Milwaukee Area Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.2% → 0.0%).
